description: rig hooks — (1) run-continuity: preserve the active harness run-state across context compaction, and carry the talk-always-on directive across compaction (PreCompact stdout becomes custom compaction instructions). (2) talk-always-on: inject a standing instruction so interactive sessions default to routing user turns through rig:talk (SessionStart additionalContext). (3) run-continuity-reminder: on each user prompt, if an active rig RUN is detected in the recent transcript (via the run-status header signature), re-inject the SKILL.md §6 directive so the model re-emits the header at the top of its response (backstops the prose-only directive which loses recency across many turns and tool calls). (4) continuous instinct-learning (#306): SessionStart injects high-confidence (>=0.7) learned patterns from .rig/instincts.jsonl (capped at 500 chars, separate from facets/knowledge); Stop reminds the model to consider proposing a new one when something durably useful was learned this session.
